title: trifolium ventricosum
intro: Trifolium ventricosum, also known as the round-leaved clover or round-leaved trefoil, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Trifolium ventricosum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and skin conditions. Trifolium ventricosum can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, or used in the form of dried flowers and leaves, which can be infused in hot water to make a soothing and medicinal infusion.
